name: collatz
creator: alain-busser
description: The famous Collatz (ou “Syracuse”) sequence, as an iterator. You can print the terms of the sequence beginning with 65 by for u in collatz(65): print(u) or compute the sequence with list(collatz(65)) or compute the maximum height with max(list(collatz(65))) or the flight duration with len(list(collatz(65)))
